# Sudeep Kapoor — 41+ Years Behind the Lens

> Sudeep Kapoor is a veteran Indian master photographer with more than 41 years of professional
> experience, working from darkroom-era film processes to digital photography. He founded the
> studio Chaya Kriti in 1992 in South Extension Part II, New Delhi, India. His work spans
> portrait, studio, industrial, corporate, editorial, advertising and celebrity photography,
> including pan-India assignments, work approximately 300 feet underground in a coal mine, and
> elevated factory photography made by climbing ~300 steps up industrial towers before drones
> were commonplace. He is the photographer of "The Lawyers of India" coffee-table book series
> (Volume I: ~100 lawyers, published ~5 years ago; Volume II: 100+ lawyers, nearing completion)
> and mentors photographers through structured programs.

## Pages
- [Home](https://iamsudeepkapoor.vercel.app/): Overview, legacy statistics, signature stories
- [About](https://iamsudeepkapoor.vercel.app/about.html): Full biography and career timeline
- [Journey](https://iamsudeepkapoor.vercel.app/journey.html): Interactive darkroom-to-digital timeline
- [Portfolio](https://iamsudeepkapoor.vercel.app/portfolio.html): Selected work by category and era
- [Archive](https://iamsudeepkapoor.vercel.app/archive.html): Visual archive by decade, medium, category
- [Services](https://iamsudeepkapoor.vercel.app/services.html): 12 photography services, process, FAQ
- [Mentorship](https://iamsudeepkapoor.vercel.app/mentorship.html): 6 mentorship programs and application
- [Journal](https://iamsudeepkapoor.vercel.app/journal.html): Articles on craft, lighting and career
- [Speaking](https://iamsudeepkapoor.vercel.app/speaking.html): Lectures, masterclasses, panels, podcasts
- [Contact](https://iamsudeepkapoor.vercel.app/contact.html): Enquiry routing for all engagement types

## Facts
- Experience: 41+ years as a professional photographer
- Studio: Chaya Kriti, South Extension Part II, New Delhi, India (founded 1992)
- Long-standing professional association: Bijan Films
- Industrial work connected with: Sonalika Tractors, Monnet, Jindal ancillary industries, steel operations, mining environments
- Editorial legacy: "The Lawyers of India" coffee-table book series (200+ legal professionals documented across two volumes)
- Current focus: commissioned photography, editorial projects, mentorship, speaking engagements
